S

saveCurrentEventId(String) - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.EventEditActivity
 
saveEvent() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.EventEditActivity
 
saveProfile() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.EntrantSetupActivity
 
saveProfile() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.OrganizerProfileActivity
 
saveProfile() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.OrganizerSetupActivity
 
savePromoCode() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.QRCodeActivity
 
scannerResult_encodedByQRCodeActivity_format_extractsEventId() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.QRCodeServiceTest
End-to-end: QRCodeActivity encodes eventId this way; scan result must parse back to same id.
scannerResult_fullUri_extractsEventIdAfterLastSlash() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.QRCodeServiceTest
App encodes as "eventlottery://event/{id}"; scanner returns that string; we extract id after last "/".
scannerResult_multipleSlashes_takesAfterLastSlash() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.QRCodeServiceTest
Same logic as MainActivity: substring after last "/" works for any URI-style or deep link.
scannerResult_null_returnsNull() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.QRCodeServiceTest
Scanner callback checks result.getContents() != null; test mirrors null handling.
scannerResult_plainEventId_returnsSameId() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.QRCodeServiceTest
If user scans a QR that contains only the raw event ID, we use it as-is.
scannerResult_trimsWhitespace() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.QRCodeServiceTest
Scanner may return content with leading/trailing space; app trims before parsing.
scannerResult_uriWithTrailingSlash_returnsEmpty() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.QRCodeServiceTest
Edge case: URI with no path after last "/" yields empty string (no crash).
searchbutton - Variable in class com.example.eventlottery.AdminEventControlScreenActivity

All fields must round-trip for profile edit and Firestore.
setters_roundTripAllFields() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.EventTest
Every field must be writable and readable for Firestore serialization and event edit screen.

Build one event with all main fields set and registration window "open" for tests that use it.
